item.title: Why is Candour Techtex Ltd falling/rising?
item.description: On 24-Mar, Candour Techtex Ltd’s stock price fell by 2.16% to close at ₹140.55, continuing a recent downward trend despite its impressive long-term returns. The decline reflects mounting concerns over the company’s deteriorating financial health and weak operational performance, which have overshadowed its market-beating gains over the past year and beyond. Time: 1 hour ago

item.title: Why is Starteck Finance Ltd falling/rising?
item.description: On 24-Mar, Starteck Finance Ltd’s share price fell by 2.0% to close at ₹245, marking a fresh 52-week low despite a broadly positive trend in the finance sector. The stock’s decline contrasts with the sector’s 2.45% gain on the same day, highlighting company-specific pressures amid rising investor activity. Time: 1 hour ago

item.title: Why is Mangalam Seeds Ltd falling/rising?
item.description: On 24-Mar, Mangalam Seeds Ltd witnessed a significant decline in its share price, falling by 6.46% to close at ₹121.55. This drop occurred despite positive momentum in the broader Agri-Seeds sector, highlighting company-specific challenges and subdued investor participation. Time: 1 hour ago

item.title: Why is Switching Technologies Gunther Ltd falling/rising?
item.description: On 24-Mar, Switching Technologies Gunther Ltd experienced a notable decline in its share price, falling 5.0% to close at ₹74.10. This drop comes amid a broader context of strong long-term performance but recent short-term weakness, highlighting a complex market dynamic for the stock. Time: 1 hour ago

item.title: Why is Sky Industries Ltd falling/rising?
item.description: On 24-Mar, Sky Industries Ltd witnessed a significant drop in its share price, falling by 5.01% to close at ₹75.10. This decline reflects a continuation of recent negative momentum, with the stock underperforming both its sector and the broader market benchmarks. Time: 1 hour ago

item.title: What is the bonus history of Hind Rectifiers?
item.description: Hind Rectifiers has issued bonuses twice, with the most recent being a 1:1 bonus announced for March 27, 2026, and a previous 1:1 bonus on October 6, 2008. This reflects the company's practice of rewarding shareholders with bonus shares. Time: Mar 24 2026 11:00 PM IST

item.title: IFB Agro Industries Ltd Forms Death Cross Signalling Potential Bearish Trend
item.description: IFB Agro Industries Ltd, a micro-cap player in the Beverages sector, has recently formed a Death Cross, a significant technical indicator where the 50-day moving average crosses below the 200-day moving average. This development signals a potential shift towards a bearish trend, reflecting a deterioration in the stock’s medium to long-term momentum despite its mixed performance metrics. Time: Mar 24 2026 06:50 PM IST

item.title: Grasim Industries Ltd Forms Death Cross, Signalling Potential Bearish Trend
item.description: Grasim Industries Ltd, a prominent player in the Cement & Cement Products sector, has recently formed a Death Cross, a technical indicator where the 50-day moving average crosses below the 200-day moving average. This development signals a potential shift towards a bearish trend, reflecting a deterioration in the stock’s medium to long-term momentum and raising concerns about sustained weakness ahead. Time: Mar 24 2026 06:50 PM IST

item.title: Ashapura Minechem Ltd Forms Death Cross, Signalling Potential Bearish Trend
item.description: Ashapura Minechem Ltd has recently formed a Death Cross, a significant technical indicator where the 50-day moving average (DMA) crosses below the 200-DMA. This development signals a potential shift towards a bearish trend, reflecting deteriorating momentum and raising concerns about the stock’s near to medium-term outlook. Time: Mar 24 2026 06:50 PM IST

item.title: Indo Borax & Chemicals Ltd Forms Death Cross, Signalling Potential Bearish Trend
item.description: Indo Borax & Chemicals Ltd has recently experienced a significant technical development as its 50-day moving average (DMA) crossed below the 200-day moving average, forming a Death Cross. This event is widely regarded as a bearish signal, indicating a potential deterioration in the stock’s trend and raising concerns about long-term weakness in the commodity chemicals sector player. Time: Mar 24 2026 06:50 PM IST

item.title: Keynote Financial Services Ltd Forms Death Cross Signalling Bearish Trend
item.description: Keynote Financial Services Ltd has recently formed a Death Cross, a significant technical indicator where the 50-day moving average (DMA) crosses below the 200-DMA, signalling a potential shift towards a prolonged bearish trend. This development highlights a deterioration in the stock’s momentum and raises concerns about its near- to medium-term outlook amid already challenging market conditions. Time: Mar 24 2026 06:50 PM IST

item.title: B C C Fuba India Ltd Forms Golden Cross Amid Mixed Technical Signals and Weak Momentum
item.description: The 50-day moving average for B C C Fuba India Ltd has crossed above the 200-day moving average, creating a golden cross on 24 Mar 2026. Yet, this technical milestone arrives amid a largely bearish backdrop on weekly and monthly indicators, raising questions about the signal’s reliability in the context of recent price weakness and fundamental factors. Time: Mar 24 2026 06:50 PM IST

item.title: Markets Rally, But ICICI Prudential Life Insurance Company Ltd Sinks to 52-Week Low in Stock-Specific Sell-Off
item.description: While the broader market showed signs of recovery, ICICI Prudential Life Insurance Company Ltd slipped closer to its 52-week low, closing just 3.9% above that mark on 24 Mar 2026. This decline comes amid a backdrop of sector gains and a rally in small caps, highlighting a divergence that warrants closer examination. Time: Mar 24 2026 04:04 PM IST

item.title: Markets Rally, But BIGBLOC Construction Ltd Sinks to 52-Week Low in Stock-Specific Sell-Off
item.description: While the broader market showed signs of recovery, BIGBLOC Construction Ltd slipped closer to its 52-week low, closing just 2.34% above that mark. This divergence highlights persistent challenges for the micro-cap cement player despite a sector-wide uptick. Time: Mar 24 2026 04:03 PM IST
